text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa arrives at summer camp and
learns of a festival nearby where locals wear
masks and dance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa can feel the spirit of the
mascarada in the masks and dance of the event,
causing her excitement for the event to grow
further.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Already taking a surprising turn, it looks like
another passionate summer camp is in store for El
Condor Pasa!
